STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_DRAIN: Another player loses {Damage:diff()} HP. They gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold]. You heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_PASS_: Another player exhausts their entire [gold]Hand[/gold]. For each card exhausted, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_YOUR_: Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Body Slam+|Body Slam}[/gold] to another player's [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_EVERY: All players exhaust their [gold]Hands[/gold], then each draws as many cards as they exhausted.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_NO_CA: Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Acrobatics+|Acrobatics}[/gold] to another player's [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SERPE: Each living player's [gold]Hand[/gold] is filled to [blue]10[/blue] cards with [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Snakebite+|Snakebite}[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_DEPLO: Each living player adds a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Infinite Blades+|Infinite Blades}[/gold] and a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Phantom Blades+|Phantom Blades}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_TOO_M: Another player gains {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]No Draw[/gold]. Draw your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [blue]10[/blue] cards.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BROTH: Each living player [gold]Forges[/gold] {Forge:diff()}. Each living player gains [gold]Brother's Blade[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_ORBIT: Each living player adds a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Orbit+|Orbit}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_MINIO: Transform every card in another player's [gold]Hand[/gold] into a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strike+|Minion Strike}[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHARE: Costs X [gold]Stars[/gold]. Each living player gains X/2 {singleStarIcon} (rounded down) and adds a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Particle Wall+|Particle Wall}[/gold] and a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Alignment+|Alignment}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].

Gain {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold]. Each living player adds an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Reaper Form+|Reaper Form}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold]; it costs [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] this turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_GROUP: Each living player gains [blue]99[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold], [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], and [gold]Double Damage[/gold]. Discard their entire [gold]Hand[/gold], then draw [blue]10[/blue] cards.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BLOOD: Each of you adds a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Sleight of Flesh+|Sleight of Flesh}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CORPS: If the chosen other player is dead, set their HP to {Heal:diff()}; otherwise heal {Heal:diff()} HP. They gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Add [gold]Corpse Curse[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].

Unplayable.
[gold]At the end of your turn[/gold], take [blue]99[/blue] damage.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BIASE: Each other living player adds [gold]Biased Cognition[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold] and gains {MpPerEnergySelfChannelPower:diff()} [gold]Energy Bias[/gold] ([blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] spent this phase channels [blue]{MpPerEnergySelfChannelPower:diff()}[/blue] random [gold]Orb(s)[/gold]).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHOCK: The chosen other player channels [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Orb[/gold]. Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Boot Sequence+|Boot Sequence}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold]. Shuffle {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dazed[/gold] into their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_STATU: Exhaust every [gold]Status[/gold] card owned by all players. For each, add a random [gold]Status[/gold] card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BRAIN: Each living player adds a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Creative AI+|Creative AI}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_ALL_O: All other living players lose all [gold]Energy[/gold]; you gain that much [gold]Energy[/gold]. At the start of your next turn, lose all [gold]Energy[/gold], gain [gold]No Draw[/gold] and [gold]Ringing[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_FOUR_: All players exhaust their [gold]Hands[/gold]. Each player adds that many random {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Colorless[/gold] cards to their [gold]Hand[/gold], then fills their [gold]Hand[/gold] to [blue]10[/blue] with [gold]Infection[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SERPE: Each living player adds a [gold]Snakebite[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold]. Only you gain [gold]Serpent Brotherhood[/gold] (when any player plays [gold]Snakebite[/gold], all players gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CHAOS: Each living player gains [blue]{IfUpgraded:show:2|1}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold]. Each living player adds one Upgraded [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]Demon Form[/gold], [gold]Serpent Form[/gold], [gold]Reaper Form[/gold], [gold]Echo Form[/gold], and [gold]Void Form[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_TIGER:
Each living player gains {MpDoubleDamageTakenPower:diff()} [gold]Double Damage Taken[/gold]. Gain [gold]Tiger Flow[/gold].
When you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold], if its type differs from the previous one, draw [blue]{MpTigerStudyFlowPower:diff()}[/blue] card(s).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHARE: At combat end, each living player gains {MpSharedFortunePower:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CHECK:
Apply [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:DPS Check+|DPS Check}[/gold] to another player.
If they play no [gold]Attack[/gold] by the end of their player turn, [gold]at the end of the players' turn[/gold]: they lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)} [gold]Energy[/gold] next turn and draw [blue]1[/blue] fewer card(s) next hand; you gain {IfUpgraded:show:{energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}|{energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}} [gold]Energy[/gold] next turn and draw {IfUpgraded:show:[blue]2[/blue]|[blue]1[/blue]} extra card(s) next turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_WRIGG: Each living player gains [gold]Energy[/gold] and draws cards equal to floor(current combat round / [blue]3[/blue]).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_GAMBL: Each hittable enemy gains {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold], {RitualPower:diff()} [gold]Ritual[/gold], and [gold]Bounty Mark[/gold] (bounty gold cap {BountyGoldCap:diff()}).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_COOL_: Each creature gains {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold]. Kill each creature whose [gold]Doom[/gold] is at least its current HP.
